title: santolina chamaecyparissus var. pectinata
intro: Santolina chamaecyparissus var. pectinata, also known as grey santolina or lavender cotton, is a perennial shrubby plant in the sunflower family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and calm various health issues. The health benefits of grey santolina include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting digestion. Herbal preparations of grey santolina can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other respiratory issues.
